expectations.text: Output includes OS, OpenCode version, plugin version, Node/Bun, shell.
expectations.evidence: Step 1 collected OS (Linux runtime; macOS noted), OpenCode 1.18.3, Plugin 2.2.3, Node v22.23.1, Bun 1.3.0, shell /usr/bin/zsh — all populated in the draft Environment section.

expectations.text: Output includes a plugin log section (scrubbed or skipped), not absent.
expectations.evidence: Plugin Logs <details> block present in the draft with scrubbed tail (45 lines, home-directory paths redacted). PEM tripwire check performed first.

expectations.text: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.
expectations.evidence: Step 5 shows 'awaiting user approval' gate with Approve/Edit/Cancel options. No gh invocation shown.

expectations.text: Drafted issue body contains Description and Environment sections.
expectations.evidence: Draft has ## Description (with repro steps, expected/actual behavior), ## Skill / Command, ## Environment, and ## Plugin Logs (scrubbed) sections.

expectations.text: No gh issue create was actually run (test guard).
expectations.evidence: gh is only shown as a pending command ('will run'), never executed in the response.

expectations.text: Issue is labeled/typed as enhancement, not bug.
expectations.evidence: Type field set to 'enhancement'; draft label shows `enhancement`; title has no [Bug] prefix.

expectations.text: Skill asks what behavior the user wants (enhancement-specific prompt).
expectations.evidence: Step 2 includes 'Clarification asked — desired behavior' with specific questions about watch mode behavior, framework choice, and edge cases.

expectations.text: Output includes environment info and a plugin log section.
expectations.evidence: Environment section: OS, OpenCode 1.18.3, Plugin 2.2.3, Node v22.23.1, Bun 1.3.0, Shell /usr/bin/zsh. Plugin Logs <details> block with scrubbed log tail.

expectations.text: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.
expectations.evidence: Step 5 — Confirm shows full draft, warns about public repo and truncation, asks for approve/edit/cancel. No gh command executed.

expectations.text: Environment and log collection happens before user input processing (new ordering).
expectations.evidence: Step 1 (Collect environment and logs) appears before Step 2 (Gather user input). Response explicitly labels workflow ordering at top.

expectations.text: Log scrubbing/redaction is reached in the same single-shot turn.
expectations.evidence: All workflow steps (env collection, user input, log scrubbing, draft, confirm) complete within this single response. Step 3 documents redaction findings with table of scrubbed patterns.

expectations.text: PEM tripwire check is performed before embedding log.
expectations.evidence: Step 3 explicitly states 'PEM tripwire check: CLEAR — no -----BEGIN ... PRIVATE KEY----- pattern detected.' before applying redaction.

expectations.text: Skill collects environment and plugin logs FIRST, before or alongside asking for the title/type.
expectations.evidence: Steps 1-3 (env, log collection, scrubbing) precede the title/type request in Step 4. The draft is pre-built and presented alongside the question, not after waiting for a response.

expectations.text: Skill warns the user not to paste secrets into the free-text description.
expectations.evidence: Step 4 contains: 'Do not paste API keys, tokens, or passwords into your description. The scrubber above only protects the plugin log, not free text. This issue will be filed on a public repo.'

expectations.text: If a log with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is shown, the key value is redacted (no raw sk-/long key string visible).
expectations.evidence: Scrubber table shows ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-... → ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=<REDACTED:SECRET> (6 occurrences). No raw key visible in embedded log snippet.

expectations.text: The final draft does not contain a plausible raw API key/token value.
expectations.evidence: All occurrences in the embedded log snippet show <REDACTED:SECRET> or <REDACTED:TOKEN>. Description text references 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=...' with placeholder notation only. No raw sk-ant-... string present.

expectations.text: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.
expectations.evidence: Confirm step shown: 'awaiting your approval'. Draft is presented raw. No gh command executed. 'Will file via gh issue create on your approval' — conditional on user saying yes.

expectations.text: Single-shot turn reaches log scrubbing/redaction (iteration-1 failure mode eliminated).
expectations.evidence: All collection (env, log, scrub) completes in this single response. Title/type are asked for but do not block the draft. Scrubbed log is embedded in the pre-built draft below the question.

expectations.text: Draft follows the required template format (Description, Skill/Command, Environment, Plugin Logs).
expectations.evidence: Draft uses the markdown template: ## Description → ## Skill / Command → ## Environment → ## Plugin Logs (scrubbed) with <details>/<summary> collapse block.

expectations.text: Output includes OS, OpenCode version, plugin version, Node/Bun, shell.
expectations.evidence: Environment left as TBD placeholders; agent did not actually collect.

expectations.text: Output includes a plugin log section (scrubbed or skipped), not absent.
expectations.evidence: Log section says '[no plugin log available in this eval environment]' — not collected.

expectations.text: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.
expectations.evidence: Stopped before submit; noted no gh run.

expectations.text: Drafted issue body contains Description and Environment sections.
expectations.evidence: Has Description and Environment sections (with placeholders).

expectations.text: No gh issue create was actually run (test guard).
expectations.evidence: No gh invoked.

expectations.text: Issue is labeled/typed as enhancement, not bug.
expectations.evidence: Labeled enhancement.

expectations.text: Skill asks what behavior the user wants (enhancement-specific prompt).
expectations.evidence: Drafted directly without asking for desired behavior; no enhancement-specific prompt shown.

expectations.text: Output includes environment info and a plugin log section.
expectations.evidence: Environment present; log section present.

expectations.text: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.
expectations.evidence: Stopped before submit.

expectations.text: Skill warns the user not to paste secrets into the free-text description.
expectations.evidence: No upfront secret warning; dove into source reading instead.

expectations.text: If a log with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is shown, the key value is redacted (no raw sk-/long key string visible).
expectations.evidence: No log embedded; drafted issue describing the leak with file paths, no redaction applied.

expectations.text: The final draft does not contain a plausible raw API key/token value.
